import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Inbox(){const{user}=useContext(AuthContext);const[conversations,setConversations]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{if(user){fetchInbox();}},[user]);const fetchInbox=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch("http://localhost:5001/api/chat/inbox/".concat(user.id));const data=await response.json();setConversations(data);}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching inbox:",error);}finally{setLoading(false);}};if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"loading",children:"Loading..."});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"home-container",style:{paddingTop:"2rem"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"view-btn",onClick:()=>navigate("/"),style:{marginLeft:"2rem",marginBottom:"2rem"},children:"\u2190 Back to Home"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{className:"home-header",style:{padding:"2rem",marginBottom:"2rem",borderRadius:"1rem",margin:"0 2rem 2rem 2rem"},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Your Inbox"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"ca-grid",style:{gridTemplateColumns:"1fr"},children:conversations.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"no-matches",children:"No messages yet."}):conversations.map(conv=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"ca-card",style:{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",padding:"1.5rem",cursor:"pointer"},onClick:()=>navigate("/chat/".concat(conv.userId)),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{style:{margin:"0 0 0.5rem 0",color:"#1e293b"},children:conv.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{margin:0,color:"#64748b"},children:conv.lastMessage})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{textAlign:"right"},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{style:{fontSize:"0.8rem",color:"#94a3b8"},children:new Date(conv.timestamp).toLocaleDateString()})})]},conv.userId))})]});}export default Inbox;
